core_principles: Clarity First: A data-dense dashboard requires hierarchy over decoration.
Warm Context: Ground the UI in the physical reality of a bakery (warm dough, bamboo steamers) using color, without sacrificing professional utility.
Vietnamese Legibility: Prioritize typography that handles Vietnamese diacritics elegantly across all weights.

structure.header: sticky top-0 h-16, flex items-center justify-between px-6, bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/40 z-50

surfaces.card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm p-5

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D4A22] text-white hover:bg-[#223819] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2D4A22] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F1EA] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#EAE5D9] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: border-border rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-[#2D4A22] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2D4A22] outline-none transition-all

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

tables.header: bg-[#F4F1EA]/50 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4

login_background.description: Warm bakery interior display case. Use as subtle, slightly blurred background for login screen.

product_placeholder_1.description: Dumpling/Banh Bao placeholder image for product grids.

product_placeholder_2.description: Dim sum / Steamed bun placeholder image 2.

icons.notes: Use for all UI icons. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 or 2 based on visual balance. Do not mix icon families.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React functional components + Tailwind CSS.
Implement Shadcn UI for complex components like DataTables, Dialogs, Selects, and the generic Button/Input primitives. Adjust their border radius and colors to match the guidelines above.
Ensure WCAG AA contrast by using the provided color scales, specifically avoiding light grays for text.
The layout must be responsive, defaulting to single column on mobile, and the sidebar transitioning to a hamburger menu on small viewports.
Language support (EN/VI) should be implemented at the context level or via i18next, with a toggle in the top header. Use Vietnamese text by default as requested.
Implement an AI Assistant floating chat button in the bottom right corner (fixed positioning, z-[100]).
For the 7-day revenue chart, use 'recharts' with a clean, gridless aesthetic. Use primary color (#2D4A22) for the main line/bar.
Add 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="login-form-submit-button"') to all interactive elements to support robust automated testing.
